phaseRuns.summary: Initialized ralphi for chronicle (Rust CLI project). Created .ralphi/config.yaml with test/lint/build/format/license commands and 8 project rules. Merged quick-start quality checks section into existing AGENTS.md. Created .git/hooks/pre-commit enforcing cargo fmt, clippy, test, and deny check. Created .gitignore with standard Rust ignores plus ralphi runtime state exclusions (config.yaml tracked).

Converted docs/specs/001-initial-delivery.md (Chronicle full spec, 16 sections) into .ralphi/prd.json with 21 user stories on branch ralph/initial-delivery. Stories are dependency-ordered from foundation (scaffolding, config, agents) through core engine (canonicalization, merge, git) to CLI commands (init, import, sync, push, pull, status, errors, config, schedule) and testing (property-based + integration). Each story is sized for one iteration with verifiable acceptance criteria including quality gates (clippy, fmt, test).

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Project scaffolding, error types, and CLI skeleton
phaseRuns.summary: US-001 complete. Created full project scaffolding: 9 module directories with mod.rs stubs (cli, config, canon, merge, git, agents, scheduler, errors, scan), main.rs with clap CLI skeleton for all 9 commands (init, import, sync, push, pull, status, errors, config, schedule with install/uninstall/status subcommands), and ChronicleError with thiserror covering all 7 §11.1 categories plus unit tests. Downgraded git2 0.19→0.18 to avoid icu_normalizer_data 10-min first-compile. All quality checks pass (clippy -D warnings, test, fmt --check, deny check).

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Config schema, loading, validation, and machine name generator
phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-002: Config schema, loading, validation, and machine name generator. Created three new source files: src/config/schema.rs (serde structs for all 6 config sections per §8.2, with per-field defaults), src/config/machine_name.rs (adjective-animal generator with 47 adjectives × 90 animals = 4,200+ combos via rand::seq::SliceRandom), and rewrote src/config/mod.rs (load() with CLI > env > file > defaults precedence chain, XDG-compliant config path, tilde expansion). Added 19 unit tests covering all acceptance criteria. All quality checks pass: cargo fmt, clippy -D warnings, cargo test (21 pass), cargo deny check. Committed as feat(config) on ralph/initial-delivery. PRD updated: US-002 status → done.

Implemented US-003: Agent directory encoding (Pi and Claude). Added the Agent trait and PiAgent/ClaudeAgent structs to src/agents/mod.rs with encode_dir, decode_dir, and session_dir. 13 unit tests covering all acceptance criteria. All quality checks pass (cargo fmt, clippy -D warnings, cargo test 34/34). US-003 marked done in prd.json; progress.txt updated with patterns and learnings.

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Token registry and L1 path canonicalization
phaseRuns.summary:
Implemented US-004: Token registry and L1 path canonicalization.

TokenRegistry in src/canon/mod.rs manages {{SYNC_HOME}} and custom tokens via from_config(). Implements canonicalize_pi_dir, canonicalize_claude_dir, decanonicalize_pi_dir, decanonicalize_claude_dir with full path-boundary matching (prevents /Users/bradmatic2 partial match). Custom tokens sorted longest-value-first; applied after SYNC_HOME during canon and before SYNC_HOME during decanon using canonical-encoded token values. 25 unit tests, all passing. cargo test (58 pass), clippy, fmt all green.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: Implementation directly satisfies all 7 acceptance criteria. Boundary matching, token ordering, round-trips, and cross-machine de-canon all verified by named unit tests. No scope creep — L2/L3 explicitly deferred to US-005 with #[allow(dead_code)] comment pointing to future stories.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-005: L2 structured field canonicalization (whitelisted JSON field paths), L3 freeform text canonicalization (opt-in), and full de-canonicalization. Depends on the TokenRegistry built in US-004.

phaseRuns.storyTitle: L2 field canonicalization, L3 freeform, and de-canonicalization
phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-005: L2 field canonicalization, L3 freeform canonicalization, and de-canonicalization. Created src/canon/fields.rs (whitelisted field walker + recursive all-strings walker), src/canon/levels.rs (canonicalize_line/decanonicalize_line dispatch + L3_WARNING), and extended src/canon/mod.rs with try_canonicalize_path, try_canonicalize_text, try_decanonicalize_text helpers and replace_in_text boundary matcher. 110 tests pass including 3 proptest round-trip properties. All quality checks pass.

phaseRuns.storyTitle: JSONL entry parsing and grow-only set merge
phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-006: JSONL entry parsing and grow-only set merge. Created src/merge/entry.rs (EntryKey, ParsedEntry, parse_entry, extract_timestamp — 15 tests) and src/merge/set_union.rs (merge_jsonl, MalformedLine, MergeOutput with stable remote-first sort — 22 tests). Updated src/merge/mod.rs to expose both submodules. All 147 tests pass; clippy, fmt, and cargo deny clean.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: All US-006 acceptance criteria met. EntryKey composite identity (type+id), Header detection (type=session), set-union merge with remote-wins, header-first then timestamp-ascending stable sort with remote-before-local tie-breaking, malformed line skip+warn, empty file handling, and §5.3 scenarios all verified by unit tests. Prefix verification (§5.2 step 2) cleanly deferred to US-007.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: Pick up US-007: Merge prefix verification and conflict resolution. Extend merge_jsonl (or add a verify step around it) to detect when common entries (same EntryKey) differ between remote and local, log detailed warnings, apply remote-version-wins, and record incidents via the error ring buffer interface (trait/callback since US-008 isn't built yet).

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Merge prefix verification and conflict resolution
phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-007: Merge prefix verification and conflict resolution. Added ConflictReporter trait, NullReporter no-op, PrefixConflict record type, extended MergeOutput with conflicts field, added reporter parameter to merge_jsonl, and implemented §5.4 byte-identical verification for common entries. 153 tests pass, all quality checks clean.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-007 implemented cleanly in a single file (set_union.rs). ConflictReporter trait provides the ring buffer interface stub needed by §5.4; NullReporter satisfies callers until US-008. All 22 existing tests updated to pass &NullReporter; 6 new US-007-specific tests cover all acceptance criteria. No scope creep. 14 stories remain open (US-008 through US-021).
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-008: Error ring buffer — 30-entry JSONL ring buffer at XDG data path with append/rotate/read/clear. Then US-009 (file scanner) and US-010 (git repo management) are independent and can follow in sequence.

phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-008: 30-entry error ring buffer. Created src/errors/ring_buffer.rs with ErrorEntry (timestamp, severity, category, file?, message, detail?), Severity enum (error|warning|info), and RingBuffer (append with rotation, read with limit, clear). Atomic writes via temp-file+rename. XDG default path via dirs::data_local_dir(). 16 unit tests. All 169 tests pass, clippy clean.

Implemented US-009: File change scanner. Created src/scan/mod.rs with StateCache (load/save/default_path), FileState, scan_dir with ChangeKind classification, ScanError, and full symlink policy enforcement. 14 unit tests covering all acceptance criteria. All 183 tests pass; fmt/clippy/deny all green. Committed as feat(scan): US-009.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-009 implemented cleanly with no scope creep. Key fixes during implementation: (1) clippy::io_other_error lint required std::io::Error::other() not Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...); (2) Utc.timestamp_opt requires chrono::TimeZone trait in scope — added to test mod. The StateCache uses absolute path as key in tests; canonical key integration deferred to US-017 as designed. All 8 acceptance criteria met with dedicated unit tests.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-010: Git repo management (init and working tree). Implement git2-based repo init at configured repo_path, open-existing, canonical directory structure (pi/sessions/, claude/projects/, .chronicle/), and manifest.json creation. Depends on US-002 (config). No new dependencies needed (git2 already in Cargo.toml).

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Git repo management (init and working tree)
phaseRuns.summary:
Implemented US-010: Git repo management (init and working tree) in src/git/mod.rs.

Key deliverables:
- `RepoManager` struct wrapping `git2::Repository`
- `init_or_open(path, remote_url)`: opens existing repo or inits new one (ErrorCode::NotFound guard); parent dirs auto-created; remote URL set (add on first init, update on reopen)
- `ensure_working_tree()`: creates pi/sessions/ + .gitkeep, claude/projects/ + .gitkeep, .chronicle/; idempotent
- `ensure_manifest()` / `read_manifest()` / `write_manifest()`: .chronicle/manifest.json with version=1 + machines HashMap; read returns default when absent
- `GitError` (thiserror): Git2, Io, Manifest variants
- `Manifest` / `MachineEntry` serde structs per §6.3 spec schema
- 16 unit tests; 199 total passing; all quality checks pass
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-010 fully implemented and all acceptance criteria met. RepoManager provides the git repo foundation that US-011 (fetch/push/retry) and US-012 (staging/commits) will extend. 10 of 21 stories done; 11 open stories remain.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-011: Git fetch/push with retry and exponential backoff (0s, 5s, 25s; 3 max retries; push rejection triggers full fetch→merge→commit→push retry cycle; network failure logged gracefully). Extends RepoManager with fetch/push methods. Depends on US-010 (done).

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Git fetch/push with retry and backoff
phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-011: Git fetch/push with retry and exponential backoff. Created src/git/fetch_push.rs with RepoManager::fetch, push_head, push_with_retry, and the testable run_push_retry core loop. Added GitError::PushRejected, PushExhausted, PUSH_BACKOFF_SECS=[0,5,25], PUSH_MAX_RETRIES=3 to mod.rs. Network errors (Net/Http/Ssl/Ssh) return immediately without retry. Push rejections trigger on_rejection callback (fetch→re-merge→commit) then retry with 0s/5s/25s backoff. 20 new unit tests: backoff timing, exhaustion counts, network early-exit, git2 smoke tests. 219 total tests pass, all quality checks green.

Implemented US-012: Git commit formatting and staging. Created src/git/commit.rs with format_sync_message, format_import_message, SyncSummary, RepoManager::stage_files, and RepoManager::commit_if_staged. All 6 acceptance criteria met, 16 new unit tests (235 total), all quality checks pass.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-012 fully implemented. Created src/git/commit.rs with all staging and commit formatting logic. All acceptance criteria covered: stage_files uses git2 index API, format_sync_message/format_import_message produce exact spec-format messages, commit_if_staged uses committer_name + chronicle@local, idempotency handled via empty-tree OID check for initial commits and HEAD tree comparison for subsequent commits. 9 open stories remain.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-013 (CLI init command) is next in priority — depends on US-002 (done) and US-010 (done). Implement chronicle init: create config.toml with defaults, generate machine name, initialize git repo, prompt for remote_url if not provided via --remote flag.

phaseRuns.summary: Implemented the `chronicle init` CLI command (US-013). The handler creates the XDG-compliant config file with defaults, auto-generates an adjective-animal machine name when absent, initializes the git repo via RepoManager (working tree + manifest), prompts for remote URL interactively (TTY-guarded with std::io::IsTerminal), emits L3_WARNING when canonicalization level ≥ 3, and prints a confirmation summary. The command is fully idempotent. 8 unit tests added; 243 total pass. All quality checks pass (fmt, clippy -D warnings, cargo test, cargo deny).

Implemented the chronicle import command (US-014). handle_import delegates to import_impl which accepts an injected home dir for testability. ImportParams struct bundles parameters to satisfy clippy::too_many_arguments. import_agent_sessions scans source session subdirs, applies L1 canonicalization to dir names and L2/L3 to file content, writes to the repo working tree, then stages+commits one commit per session directory. --agent pi|claude|all filter, --dry-run skips repo init entirely. 7 new tests; 250/250 passing.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-015: CLI push and pull commands — implement chronicle push (canonicalize local changes, commit, push to remote; no pull) and chronicle pull (fetch, merge at JSONL entry level, de-canonicalize, write local; no push). Both support --dry-run. Depends on US-005, US-006, US-007, US-011, US-012.

phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-015: CLI push and pull commands. Added handle_push/push_impl (scan changed files, canonicalize, merge with repo, commit, push with retry + ring buffer error logging) and handle_pull/pull_impl (fetch, integrate remote tree via git2 tree walk, materialize canonical files to local agent dirs with permission preservation). Added 8 new tests (258 total). All quality checks pass: fmt, clippy, test, deny.

Implemented US-016: Partial history materialization (§7). Added MaterializeFilter enum, pi_filename_timestamp(), claude_earliest_file_timestamp(), select_partial_session_files() helpers, and modified materialize_agent_dir/materialize_repo_to_local to apply per-directory partial filtering during incoming sync. Outgoing sync is unaffected. 9 new tests, 267 total passing. All quality checks pass.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-016 fully implemented per spec §7. All 8 acceptance criteria satisfied. Implementation correctly scopes partial filtering to per-subdirectory, handles both Pi (filename timestamp) and Claude (earliest entry timestamp) recency strategies, never deletes existing local files, and leaves all outgoing sync paths untouched.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-017: CLI sync command — full bidirectional sync cycle orchestrating all phases: outgoing (scan→canonicalize→merge→commit), git exchange (fetch→merge remote→push with retry), incoming (decanon→partial filter→write local). Update state cache and manifest.json. Support --dry-run and --quiet flags.

phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-017: chronicle sync command. Added sync_impl() — the full bidirectional sync cycle orchestrating outgoing (scan/canonicalize/commit), git exchange (fetch/integrate_remote_changes/push_with_retry), and incoming (materialize_repo_to_local with partial filter) phases. Added build_updated_manifest() helper that upserts last_sync in manifest.json (committed alongside session files or written-to-disk-only for idempotent syncs). Modified materialize_agent_dir() with content-equality check to skip writing identical local files (satisfies idempotency criterion). 5 new tests cover dry_run, full pipeline, manifest update, state cache, and idempotency. 272 tests pass; all quality checks green.

phaseRuns.storyTitle: CLI status, errors, and config commands
phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-018: CLI status, errors, and config commands. Added handle_status/status_impl (machine name, last sync from manifest, pending changes via scanner, remote URL, agent status), handle_errors/errors_impl (ring buffer display with optional --limit), and handle_config/config_impl (full TOML print, dotted-key read, dotted-key set+persist, special machine-name alias). Added expand_home() helper for test injection. 13 new unit tests; 285 total passing. All quality checks pass (clippy, fmt, test, deny).

Implemented US-019: Scheduler (cron management). Created src/scheduler/cron.rs with pure testable core (interval_to_cron with round-down warning, filter_marker_lines, build_entries, apply_install, apply_uninstall, parse_status) and I/O layer (crontab_read/write, install, uninstall, status). Updated src/scheduler/mod.rs and replaced 3 CLI stubs in src/cli/mod.rs with full handle_schedule_install/uninstall/status implementations. 27 new unit tests; 312 total. All quality checks pass.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: All 9 acceptance criteria met. Pure logic separated from I/O for full testability without spawning crontab processes. Interval mapping handles all 6 standard values exactly plus round-down with warning for non-standard values. Binary auto-detection uses current_exe(). Two open stories remain: US-020 (property-based tests) and US-021 (integration tests).
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-020: Property-based tests using proptest for merge commutativity, associativity, idempotency, merge superset, and canonicalization round-trip (all levels, random home paths).

phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-020: Property-based tests using proptest across three source files. Added 8 new proptest tests covering all five §15.3 invariants: merge commutativity (entry-key SET identical after swapping remote/local using disjoint ID prefixes), merge associativity (set-level: merge(merge(A,B),C) == merge(A,merge(B,C))), merge idempotency (merge(A,A) same keys, zero conflicts), merge superset (all A and B keys appear in merged output), and canonicalization round-trips for L1 Pi, L1 Claude, L2, and L3 with randomly generated home paths. All 320 tests pass; cargo fmt, clippy -D warnings, and cargo deny all clean.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-020 fully implements the property-based test suite: 4 merge properties (commutativity, associativity, idempotency, superset) and 4 canonicalization round-trips (L1 Pi, L1 Claude, L2 random home, L3 random home). Only US-021 (integration tests) remains open.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: Pick up US-021: Integration tests in tests/ directory covering two-machine sync, concurrent appends, canonicalization round-trip, partial history materialization, malformed JSONL, import batching, and idempotent sync.

phaseRuns.summary: Implemented US-021: Integration tests in tests/integration.rs covering 8 end-to-end multi-machine scenarios. Added src/lib.rs to expose modules for tests/ access. Changed *_impl functions to pub fn. Fixed integrate_remote_changes to create merge commits (enabling multi-machine push). All 21 PRD stories are now done: 328 tests pass (320 lib + 8 integration), cargo fmt/clippy/deny all pass.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: US-021 is the final story. All 21 user stories in the PRD are now done. The integration tests cover all acceptance criteria: two-machine sync, concurrent appends (same/different dirs), canonicalization round-trip, partial history (200 sessions → 50 materialized), malformed JSONL handling (via merge path), import batching (5 dirs → 5 commits), and idempotent sync. A key discovery was that integrate_remote_changes needed to create merge commits (not plain commits) for multi-machine push to succeed as a fast-forward.

phaseRuns.summary: Phase cancelled by user — ralphi-init was not intended. Session work included: post-loop wrap-up (merged ralph/initial-delivery → main, bumped 0.1.0 → 0.2.0), SSH auth fix for git2/libgit2 fetch+push, open-source prep (LICENSE, CI workflows for GitHub + Forgejo, community docs, templates, Cargo.toml metadata), merge conflict resolution with remote, configured branch enforcement (storage.branch default "main" via RepositoryInitOptions), integration test parallelism fix (state cache path isolation), version bumps to 0.2.1 and 0.2.2, and a comprehensive 19-issue codebase audit saved to docs/research/001-codebase-audit.md.

Converted the v0.2.2 codebase audit (docs/research/001-codebase-audit.md) into .ralphi/prd.json with 8 user stories covering 16 of the 19 audit issues (3 placeholder issues excluded per user preference, 1 retracted). Stories are dependency-ordered: schema validation → bug fixes → doc/code improvements → dead code cleanup → refactor → consistency → deprecation → doc sweep. Previous prd.json (ralph/initial-delivery) archived to .ralphi/archive/2026-03-29-initial-delivery/.

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Validate canonicalization.level range (1–3) at config and schema level
phaseRuns.summary: US-001 complete: Added canonicalization.level range validation (1–3) at both the serde deserialization layer (deserialize_canon_level in config/schema.rs) and the CLI set_config_value layer (cli/mod.rs). 12 new boundary tests added (7 schema, 5 CLI). All 332 tests pass; clippy, fmt, deny clean. Committed as 46625c1 on ralph/audit-fixes.
phaseRuns.reflectionSummary: All acceptance criteria met. Both validation paths (serde parse-time and CLI set-time) now reject level=0 and level=4+ with clear errors. Boundary tests cover 0,1,2,3,4 for CLI and 0,1,2,3,4,255 for serde. No scope creep.
phaseRuns.nextIterationPlan: US-002: Fix status_impl hardcoded branch, ring buffer global path, and temp filename collision. Depends on US-001 (now done). Three fixes: status_impl passes cfg.storage.branch; RingBuffer gets path_for_repo(); StateCache::save uses as_nanos().

phaseRuns.storyTitle: Fix status_impl hardcoded branch, ring buffer global path, and temp filename collision
